title: Alibaba Stock Tumbles 8% After Big Earnings Miss
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On May 15, 2025, Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: [BABA](https://tickeron.com/ticker/BABA/)) saw its U.S.-listed shares plummet nearly 8% following a disappointing fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report for 2025. The Chinese e-commerce and cloud computing giant missed both revenue and profit expectations, reigniting concerns about its growth trajectory amid a challenging economic environment in China.
